title: The Foreign Trade (Development and Regulation) Act, 1992
full_text: The Foreign Trade (Development and Regulation) Act, 1992 विदेश व्‍यापार (विकास और विनियमन) अधिनियम, 1992 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1992-22 Act Number: 22 Enactment Date: 1992-08-07 Act Year: 1992 Short Title: The Foreign Trade (Development and Regulation) Act, 1992 Hindi Title: विदेश व्‍यापार (विकास और विनियमन) अधिनियम, 1992 Long Title: An Act to provide for the development and regulation of foreign trade by facilitating imports into, and augmenting exports from, India and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Commerce Enforcement Date: 19-06-1992 Notification: Ss. 11 to 14 (07-08-1992) TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Foreign Trade (Development and Regulation) Act, 1992 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II POWER OF CENTRAL GOVERNMENT TO MAKE ORDER AND ANNOUNCE FOREIGN TRADE POLICY CHAPTER III IMPORTER-EXPORTER CODE NUMBER AND LICENCE CHAPTER IIIA QUANTITATIVE RESTRICTIONS CHAPTER IV SEARCH, SEIZURE, PENALTY AND CONFISCATION CHAPTER IVA CONTROLS ON EXPORT OF SPECIFIED GOODS, SERVICES AND TECHNOLOGY CHAPTER V APPEAL AND REVIEW CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Powers to make provisions relating to imports and exports. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Crediting sums realised by way of penalties in Consolidated Fund of India. Section 11B. Empowering Settlement Commission for regularisation of export obligation default. Section 12. Penalty or confiscation not to interfere with other punishment. Section 13. Adjudicating Authority. Section 14. Giving of opportunity to the owner of the goods (including the goods connected with services or technology), etc. Section 14A. Controls on export of specified goods, services and technology. Section 14B. Transfer controls. Section 14C. Catch-all controls. Section 14D. Suspension or cancellation of a licence. Section 14E. Offences and penalties. Section 15. Appeal. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Review. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Powers of Adjudicating and other Authorities. Show Related Subordinates Section 18.
